sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42851" key="e)rwtideu/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐρωτ-ῐδεύς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">έως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n42851.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a young Eros :</tr_> pl., <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἐρωτιδεῖς</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Anacreont.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">25.13</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
